items.prompt: In Example 11.9, which review types does active learning preferentially request labels for?
choices: Ironic or mixed reviews where the model is uncertain
Only reviews already labeled by three experts
Random reviews with no uncertainty ranking
Only five-star reviews with clear praise
items.explain: Uncertainty or entropy sampling targets ironic or mixed reviews for nuance.

items.prompt: Example 11.10 requires labeling every fleet frame for driving perception.
items.explain: Uncertainty sampling focuses on occluded or weather-degraded hard cases.

items.prompt: What does Example 11.12 surface for radiologist review?
choices: X-rays with atypical pneumonia or overlapping pathologies
items.explain: Uncertainty sampling routes atypical or overlapping pneumonia cases to experts.

items.prompt: What clinical goal does Example 11.13 pursue with dermoscopic uncertainty queues?
items.rubric: Improve on early melanoma / hard lesions without labeling every image.
items.sample_answer: Improve the classifier on early melanoma and other hard lesions without labeling every image.

items.prompt: Active learning in healthcare is useful partly because expert medical labels are scarce and costly.
items.explain: Section 11.4 stresses reducing expert annotation volume while focusing on hard cases.
